title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi 3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama. Chat, generate, embed, pull, and push models with a simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Ollama. Works in Node ≥ 18, Deno, and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package integrating Ollama models into LangChain LLM, Chat, and Embeddings interfaces.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI). ChatGPT-like interface, model manager, RAG, multi-user.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama. Generate, chat, pull, push, list models with POJOs and streaming.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama. Simple interface to chat and generate completions with local models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive REPL and CLI tool for chatting with Ollama models, built with Node.js and Ink.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Use Ollama models as GitHub Copilot replacement in VS Code via Copilot Chat API.

title: ollama-agents
summary: Lightweight agent framework on top of Ollama for tool use, planning, and memory.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal cross-platform desktop GUI for Ollama built with Tauri and React.

title: ollama-ts
summary: TypeScript-first Ollama client with full type coverage and Deno support.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat with Ollama models inside your editor, generate code, and refactor.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images for Ollama server with GPU (CUDA, ROCm) and CPU variants.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Simple Node.js package to create interactive chat sessions with Ollama models.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation pipeline using Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama supporting threads, ephemeral messages, and model switching.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package for communicating with Ollama API, supports streaming and embeddings.
